locations.summary: 约翰·弗里德里希·格梅林（德語：Johann Friedrich Gmelin，1748年8月8日—1804年11月1日）是一名德国博物学家、植物学家、昆虫学家、爬虫两栖类学家和軟體動物學家。 生平 1748年，约翰·弗里德里希·格梅林出…

relations.evidence: | image2 =Rain Quail (female).jpg | image2_caption = Female thumb|center|Call | genus = Coturnix | species = coromandelica | authority = (Gmelin, JF, 1789) }} thumb|In Bhigwan, Maharashtra, India. thumb|Drawing of the head of a rain quail The rain quail or black-breasted quail (Coturnix coromandelica) is a species of quail found in the Indian Sub-continent and South-east Asia; its range including Pakistan, India, Nepal, Sri Lanka, Bangladesh, Myanmar, Thailand, Cambodia and Vietnam
